title: aes: redundant iv len conversion after exact-size guard
description: In crypto/aes.rs, gcm_encrypt and gcm_decrypt both check iv.len() != 12 then immediately do u32::try_from(iv.len()), which can never fail (12 fits in u32). The try_from exists for mechanical consistency with the other conversions but obscures that iv_len is always the constant 12. Rewrite: remove the try_from and write let iv_len: u32 = 12; (or pass 12u32 directly to the FFI call), making clear the length is structurally fixed.
